finding: F-B08-RA-1: verbatim case drift '<Race codelist>' vs PDF '<RACE codelist>' (lowercase vs uppercase 'RACE'); content correct, non-semantic MINOR.

F-B08-RA-2: parent_section '§5.2 [CRF Metadata]' incorrect — SDTMIG v3.4 §5.2 is CO (Comments), not 'CRF Metadata'. p.76 is still within §5.1 DM (continues Example 6 CRF mock). 'CRF Metadata' is a local sub-table label, NOT a numbered chapter section. heading_level=2 also wrong (not N.x chapter heading). Systematic error across atoms 6/7/8.

F-B08-RA-3: parent_section '§5.2 [CRF Metadata]' incorrect — same systematic mis-classification as F-B08-RA-2. p.77 continues §5.1 DM Example 6 with Rows 1-3 narrative + dm.xpt/suppdm.xpt tables. Not §5.2 CO. (Row N: HEADING convention per batch 08b sibling_index backfill is accepted; only parent_section is wrong.)

F-B08-RA-4: parent_section '§5.2 [CRF Metadata]' incorrect — same systematic mis-classification. p.78 shows DM Example 6 narrative tail (Row 1/2/3 JAPANESE/AFRICAN AMERICAN/BLACK suppdm rows) + Example 7 CRF Mock RACE/RACEOTH/RACEAS + dm.xpt. All §5.1 DM content. §5.2 in SDTMIG v3.4 is CO (Comments), not 'CRF Metadata'.

F-B08-RA-5: VERBATIM PARAPHRASE — atom says 'reviewers can EVALUATE all observations made about a subject IN THE CONTEXT OF that subject's progression through the trial'; PDF p.79 says 'reviewers can RELATE all observations made about a subject TO that subject's progression through the trial'. Two word substitutions (evaluate→relate, in the context of→to). Core fidelity breach.

F-B08-RA-6: verbatim truncated — missing Core column 'Perm' at end. PDF p.80 SEENDY full row: 'SEENDY | Study Day of End of Element | Num | | Timing | Study day of end of element relative to the sponsor-defined RFSTDTC. | Perm'. Atom stops before 'Perm'. Structural/column-count issue, not content paraphrase; non-semantic MINOR. sibling_index=12 correct (SE spec table total order STUDYID..SEUPDES = 13 rows, SEENDY is 12th).
